zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Spencer於1620年11月出生在英國英格蘭倫敦斯特普尼時，她的父親Nicholas Spencer20歲，母親Catherine Chapin20歲。她於1647年8月26日與William Hancock II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1689年4月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可林哈文 帕里什享年68歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可林哈文 帕里什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Spencer于1620年11月出生在英国英格兰倫敦斯特普尼时，她的父亲Nicholas Spencer20岁，母亲Catherine Chapin20岁。她于1647年8月26日与William Hancock II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1689年4月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可林哈文 帕里什享年68岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可林哈文 帕里什。

nameMeanings.name: Spencer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name for someone who dispensed provisions or money, from Middle English spenser(e), spencer(e) ‘household steward, butler, almoner’ (Anglo-Norman French espenser, Old French despensier). Compare Spence and Spender . There is some dispute about the origins of the Spencer family, whose most famous member in recent times was the late Princess of Wales, born Lady Diana Spencer (1961–97). Some sources say that they are descended from William the Conqueror's steward, Robert Despencer. What is clear is that by the 15th century they had become prosperous from sheep farming in Northamptonshire. Robert Spencer (died 1627) was said to be the wealthiest man in England. Their titles have included Earls of Sunderland and Earls Spencer; and through the female line the 5th Earl of Sunderland also became Duke of Marlborough in 1733. This connection was the result of the marriage, in 1700, of the 3rd Duke of Sunderland to the daughter of John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough. The youngest son of this union, John Spencer (1708–46), was the father of the 1st Earl Spencer (1734–83).

variants.name: Spence
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a servant employed in the pantry of a great house or monastery, from Middle English spense, spence ‘pantry, larder, storeroom’ (Old French despense, from a Late Latin derivative of dispendere, past participle dispensus ‘to weigh out or dispense’). Compare Spencer .

variants.name: Spender
meanings: occupational name or status name from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘steward, treasurer’, a shortened form of Middle English, Old French despendour, denoting someone who managed money or supplies. Compare Spencer .
alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘spender (of money), spendthrift’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Spencer was born in November 1620, in Stepney, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Nicholas Spencer, was 20 and her mother, Catherine Chapin, was 20. She married William Hancock II on 26 August 1647, in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 April 1689, in Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 68, and was buried in Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Spencer est née en novembre 1620, à Stepney, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Spencer, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Catherine Chapin, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Hancock II le 26 août 1647, à Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 avril 1689, à Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterrée à Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

August 1647 in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America William Hancock II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Spencer è nata il nel novembre 1620 nel Stepney, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Nicholas Spencer, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Catherine Chapin, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Hancock II il 26 agosto 1647, nel Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 aprile 1689, nel Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolta a Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Spencerが1620年11月にイギリスイギリスロンドンステプニーで生まれた時，父Nicholas Spencerは20歳，母Catherine Chapinは20歳であった。1647年8月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノーフォルクでWilliam Hancock IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1689年4月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノーフォルクリンヘイベン パーイッシュで68歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ノーフォルクリンヘイベン パーイッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Spencer(이)가 1620년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스테프니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Spencer(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Chapin(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1647년 8월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크에서 William Hancock II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1689년 4월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크 리하븐 파리시에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크 리하븐 파리시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Spencer nasceu em novembro de 1620, em Stepney, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Spencer, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Chapin, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hancock II em 26 de agosto de 1647, em Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de abril de 1689, em Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 68 anos, e foi sepultada em Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.Lawnes Creek Parish, Surry Co, Virginia: лавне'с крик пэриш, исл оф ваит, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Spencer родилась ноябрь 1620 г. в местности степни, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Nicholas Spencer было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Chapin, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hancock II 26 августа 1647 г. в местности норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 1 апреля 1689 г. в местности линнавен пэриш, норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет и была похоронена в местности линнавен пэриш, норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Spencer nació en noviembre de 1620, en Stepney, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas Spencer, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Catherine Chapin, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Hancock II el 26 de agosto de 1647, en Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de abril de 1689, en Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultada en Lynnhaven Parish, Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America.
